results.title: CEO Coaching International
results.text:
Coaching for CEOs, Entrepreneurs & Executives - CEO Coaching International

ELITE CEO COACHES

## ELITE CEO COACHES

# PROVEN RESULTS, TRANSFORMATIVE OUTCOMES

What We Do Who We Serve Our System

## Be The Leader You Want To Be

With CEO Coaching International you will gain the confidence and acumen to take your drive to the next level. We have coached more than 2,000 CEOs and entrepreneurs in businesses of all stages through a proven methodology that promotes a healthy team dynamic to drive outsized growth results.

## For All Leadership Stages

We have coached more than 2,000 CEOs and entrepreneurs in businesses of every size, model, and growth stage, in over 90 countries and industries. Lean on us for a smarter way to lead.

## A Proven 3-Step Process

The Make BIG Happen System is a 3-step process, supported by over 25 proven tools, to help CEOs achieve extraordinary business growth through process, accountability, and focus.

See Our Coaching Process

## A Proven Coaching FrameworkThat Drives Results

x

CEO Coaching International Client CEOs Experience EBITDA Growth nearly 3X the National Averages – learn more

$ B

In Annual Revenue Generated by Our Clients Using the Make BIG Happen System

+

Companies That Have Successfuly Used the Make BIG Happen System

OUR ADVANTAGE

## A CEO Coaching Community Centered Around Growth

Our coaches are former CEOs, presidents, and executives who have led double-digit sales and profit growth in businesses ranging from startups to over $10 billion. Many of the CEO Coaching International coaches are founders that have led their companies through successful eight, nine, and ten-figure exits.

# 107 client exits worth over $26.6B – read the case studies

#### Lucent Health

#### NewDay USA

#### ShipMonk

“Happy to announce that ShipMonk has just been named as a Company of the Year in the 2021 BIG Awards for Business!” …

## Highly Trained, Battle-Tested Coaches

Companies engaged with CEO Coaching International for at least two years have experienced an average revenue CAGR of 22.8%, nearly 2X the U.S. average, and an average EBITDA CAGR of 37.5%, nearly 3X the national benchmark.* *based on statistics from the NYU Stern School of Business

## Proven Experience

#### Growth Focused

Leading top companies listed in the Inc. 500

#### Meaningful Exits

Guiding ventures from start-up through successful sale

#### Sales Performance

Creating sales organizations from the ground up

#### Issue Resolution

Interim CEO engagements to turn around struggling companies

#### The Right People

Hiring and keeping people that make your business great

#### Supply Chain

Developing global distribution channels and logistics planning

## The Latest Newsfrom CEO Coaching International

Grow Profit at 3X the National Average

## Extraordinary Client Results.

Our 2025 client performance results are in, and companies engaged with CEO Coaching International for at least two years have experienced an average revenue CAGR of 22.8%, nearly 2X the U.S. average, and an average EBITDA CAGR of 37.5%, nearly 3X the national benchmark.

Making BIG Happen – It’s Official

## World-Class Client Satisfaction.

We achieved a Net Promoter Score of 64.91 in our 2025 client survey, placing us among the top tier of professional services firms worldwide. For comparison, industry averages range from 30 to 40.

## Get The Latest Insights

properties.name: CEO Coaching International
properties.description: CEO Coaching International works with CEOs and their leadership teams to achieve extraordinary results quarter after quarter, year after year. Known globally for its success in coaching growth-focused entrepreneurs to meaningful exits, CEO Coaching International has coached more than 2,000 CEOs and entrepreneurs in more than 90 countries. The coaches at CEO Coaching International are former CEOs, presidents, or executives who have made BIG happen. The firm's coaches have led double-digit sales and profit growth in businesses ranging in size from startups to over $10 billion, and many are founders that have led their companies through successful eight, nine, and ten-figure exits. Companies working with CEO Coaching International for two years or more have experienced an average EBITDA CAGR of 37.5% during their time as a client, nearly three times the U.S. average, and a revenue CAGR of 22.8%, nearly twice the U.S. average. For more information, please visit: https://www.ceocoachinginternational.com.

results.title: Senior Leadership Team - CEO Coaching International
results.text:
Senior Leadership Team - CEO Coaching International

Senior Leadership Team

# BIG Leadership

Meet the CEO Coaching International Senior Leadership team

## Meet Our Team

Founding Partner & Executive Chairman

## Mark Moses

Mark Moses is the Founding Partner and Executive Chairman of CEO Coaching International. He is the author of the international bestselling book Make BIG Happen, and the Wall Street Journal bestselling follow-up book, Making BIG Happen. Mark has won Ernst & Young’s Entrepreneur of the Year award and the Blue Chip Enterprise award for overcoming adversity. His last company ranked #1 Fastest-Growing Company in Los Angeles as well as #10 on the Inc. 500 of fastest-growing private companies in the U.S. He has completed 12 full-distance Ironman Triathlons including the Hawaii Ironman World Championship 5 times.

Chief Executive Officer

## Randy Dewey

Randy Dewey is the CEO of CEO Coaching International. He brings his signature blend of operational prowess, strategic vision, and financial foresight to the firm’s day-to-day business. Dewey has over 30 years of experience delivering rapid growth and expansion in many different countries worldwide. He assisted Blackstone with many turnarounds to successful nine-figure exits in the first half of his career. In the second half of his CEO career, he worked in a private family office environment and within the public markets. The organizations ranged from start-ups to $750M in revenue.

Chief AI Officer

## Curt Gooden

As Chief AI Officer at CEO Coaching International, Curt Gooden helps CEOs define and realize their AI vision and meaningfully integrate AI into their business strategy and operations. He also helps steer CEO Coaching International’s AI strategy. Gooden is an accomplished C-Suite IT executive with over two decades of exceptional leadership and innovation in the Information Technology sector. His CIO tenure at international corporations such as TaskUs and Everise, along with pivotal roles at Intrawest, TTEC, Aegis, and SOURCECORP, has solidified his reputation as a leader in the field.

Chief Product Officer

## Greg Coticchia

Greg Coticchia is a 6X CEO, award-winning entrepreneur, business leader, professor, and author with over 30 years’ experience in tech products and services. As Chief Product Officer at CEO Coaching International, Greg brings the product instinct, discipline, and experience required to ensure we are delivering real value to both our coaches and our clients. Greg created and launched Carnegie Mellon University’s Master’s Program in Product Management (MSPM), the world’s first product management degree, serving as its founding executive director.

SVP of Finance

## Beau Cameron

Beau Cameron is a dynamic leader who is passionate about deepening relationships and bringing people together to achieve operational excellence, as well as creating outstanding customer experiences. He previously spent over 11 years at YPO, where he most recently served as the Global Events and Services Operations Director. As CEO Coaching International’s SVP of Finance, Beau leads all aspects of the company’s financial operations to support the company’s strategic growth vision.

SVP of Sales

## David Sobel

David Sobel is a dedicated business coach and highly successful entrepreneur who helps individuals and businesses achieve success by reaching three important goals: growing revenue, growing profit, and growing people. He is very driven and holds his clients accountable in order to achieve the goals set. David subscribes to the philosophy of, “what gets measured gets done.” David served as Partner and VP of Sales for Home Warranty of America (HWA) for 13 years, building a scalable sales model that culminated in the sale of the business for $50,000,000.

Chief of Staff

## Rachel Smith

Rachel Smith serves as the Chief of Staff at CEO Coaching International, owning critical initiatives and managing teams that drive the growth of the business. Since joining the company in 2018, Rachel has played a pivotal role in shaping the firm’s growth, contributing to the development of every area of the business. Rachel earned her MBA from the University of Southern California and her BBA from California State University, Fullerton.

VP Of Marketing

## Derek Feniger

As Vice President of Marketing at CEO Coaching International, Derek Feniger leads the firm’s marketing engine, spanning brand strategy, demand generation, content, and growth infrastructure, helping more of the world’s top CEOs discover the coaching that drives BIG results. Feniger is an accomplished marketing executive with over two decades of leadership in AI- and data-driven growth. His tenure leading lifecycle and database growth marketing at Vistage Worldwide, more than a decade in hospitality building automation and systems that drove measurable growth, and two decades advising 25+ global brands through his consultancy Fen Digital have established his reputation as a leader in modern, data-driven marketing. Outside the office, Feniger is a devoted dad of two who spends his time on sports fields, hiking trails, and campsites around San Diego.

VP Of Client Development

## Kalin Foster

Kalin Foster is a multitalented sales leader with a record of creating, scaling, and leading high-performing teams in high-growth and start-up environments. He previously spent over 12 years in the executive membership industry where he served as the Director of Sales at World 50. During his tenure, World 50 grew to over 1,700 members representing companies that average more than $27B in revenue. As the Vice President of Client Development, Kalin helps clients by ensuring they have access to the coaches that enable them to Make BIG Happen.

VP Of Events & Partner Experience

## Madison Naas

Madison Naas serves as Vice President of Events & Partner Experience at CEO Coaching International, where she oversees the firm’s event strategy and strategic partnerships. With more than 15 years of experience designing high-impact programs for executives and global organizations, Madison has managed multimillion-dollar event portfolios, developed impactful partner programs, and leveraged technology and innovation to elevate engagement and business outcomes. She is passionate about creating meaningful opportunities that foster connection, drive growth, and strengthen the CEOCI community. Outside of work, Madison can be found planning her next international adventure, discovering hidden culinary gems, or spending time with her dog, Millie, in the parks of St. Louis.

Chief Information Security Officer

## Michael Tamir

Michael Tamir, serving as CISO at CEO Coaching International, is a seasoned cybersecurity executive with more than 20 years of experience leading security, compliance, and technology operations. A Certified Information Systems and Cloud Security Professional, he has built and overseen cybersecurity programs that protect critical systems, data, and customers, and has a strong track record of aligning security leadership with operational execution to help organizations address evolving cyber threats.

Companies engaged with CEO Coaching International for at least two years have experienced an average revenue CAGR of 22.8%, nearly 2X the U.S. average, and an average EBITDA CAGR of 37.5%, nearly 3X the national benchmark.

results.title: AI Strategy Services - CEO Coaching International
results.text:
AI Strategy Services - CEO Coaching International

Connecting AI Value to Enterprise Value

# AI STRATEGY

Let us help you develop a clear AI Strategy that ties directly to your Business Strategy.

Book an AI Discovery Call

## THE AI SUPPORT YOU NEED

Artificial Intelligence is radically impacting your industry and your company in real time. If you don’t act soon to integrate AI into your operations, your company will be at risk. But with so much talk out there about AI, it’s hard to know where to start.

Let the experts at CEO Coaching International help you develop a clear and practical roadmap for connecting your AI initiatives to your business goals.

Book a discovery call today to see how we can help you develop your AI Strategy.

Book an AI Discovery Call

Take Your AI Assessment

## CEO vs AI: Mark Moses’ Interview With His AI Twin

FREE EBOOK

## GET CLEAR ON AI

Are you feeling stuck when it comes to integrating AI into your business strategy? You’re not alone. Many CEOs like you recognize the transformative power of AI but are unsure where to start. Our eBook, CEOs: Ask These 5 Questions to Get Clear on AI, is designed to provide the clarity you need to take your first steps into the AI revolution.

Download it today, block out time on your calendar to read it, and consider it the most important meeting you’ll have this year.

Going on the Offensive with AI

## Watch the Webcasts

Are you ready to lead the charge and take your business to the next level with AI? Join our exclusive 4-part webcast series “Going on the Offensive with AI” to keep your business ahead of the curve.

### WATCH | Understanding AI and Its Strategic Importance for CEOs

In our first session of the series, CEO Coaching International’s Chief AI Officer Curt Gooden guided us through the essentials of AI, providing actionable insights to empower CEOs like you in navigating the AI landscape.

### WATCH | Harnessing the Power of ChatGPT for Business

In our second session of the series, Rajeev Kapur, bestselling author of “ AI Made Simple,” shared his expertise on leveraging ChatGPT to transform your business operations.

### WATCH | Developing AI Tools: Practical Insights for CEOs

In our third session of the series, Brandon Powell and Matt Paige from software development company Hatchworks shared their expertise on developing practical and cost-effective AI tools tailored for specific business needs.

### WATCH | Avoiding AI Failure: Why CEOs Must Master Data Now

In our fourth session of the series, Tim Kreytak and Paul Hardy from Data, Analytics, and AI consultancy Ironside provided invaluable insight into why ignoring data is a costly mistake that CEOs cannot afford to make.

## Take Your AI Assessment

### Quick Assessment:

### Are You Ready for AI?

## CEO AI Roadmap

Our two AI offerings are both led by a world-class coach and will help you develop a clear AI roadmap, customized for CEOs and the C-Suite.

#### Training & Workshop

Part 1: CEO AI Roadmap Training: During this 2-4 hour training, we’ll educate and train you and your team on the latest AI tools, approaches, and research to consider for your roadmap.

Part 2: CEO AI Roadmap Workshop: During this 4-hour workshop, we’ll go through the 4 crucial steps to generate a roadmap, including:

- Identify potential AI initiatives
- Confirm your biggest business opportunities
- Plot the AI initiatives on your business roadmap
- Integrate 1-3 initiatives into your annual/quarterly plan

#### Workshop Only

During this 4-hour workshop, a world-class coach will help you develop a clear AI roadmap, customized for CEOs and the C-Suite.

CEO AI Roadmap Workshop: The workshop will cover the 4 crucial steps to generate a roadmap, including:

- Identify potential AI initiatives
- Confirm your biggest business opportunities
- Plot the AI initiatives on your business roadmap
- Integrate 1-3 initiatives into your annual/quarterly plan

"With all the AI noise out there, the CEO Coaching International AI Roadmap was the perfect framework to create our AI strategy, and more importantly, integrate our AI Strategy to our Business Strategy. I would encourage every CEO to run this workshop with their executive team. The Roadmap transformed our Annual Plan!”

> — Danny Frisco, CEO, Rapido

## Learn more about CEO AI Roadmap:
